task:
FreeCAD is open with /home/user/Documents/empty_prefs.FCStd. Do not edit the config file by hand — change the settings through FreeCAD's preferences so they are flushed to `~/.config/FreeCAD/user.cfg`.

Apply all four of the following preference values:
1. General > Theme = `Dark` (writes `BaseApp/Preferences/General/ThemeName=Dark`).
2. General > Enable document save (auto save) enabled (writes `BaseApp/Preferences/General/AutoSaveEnabled=true`).
3. General > Auto save interval = 180 seconds (writes `BaseApp/Preferences/General/AutoSaveInterval=180`).
4. General > Units > User system = `Imperial from SI (in, in/s^2)`, schema index 2 (writes `BaseApp/Preferences/Units/UserSchema=2`).

verification.description: Units schema set to 2 (Imperial from SI)
